description: A guest is at the front desk to check out and settle their bill.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the correct guest bill.

nodes.task_description: Review the charges with the guest and confirm they are correct.

expected_outcome.expected: The guest agrees to all charges on the folio.

nodes.task_description: Process the final payment using the credit card on file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully processes the payment and provides the guest with a final receipt.

nodes.task_description: Update the room status to 'Vacant/Dirty' in the PMS.

expected_outcome.expected: The room status is updated, notifying housekeeping.
